new_classes.label_en: Other Non-Alcoholic Beverage with High Dairy-Derived Fat Content
new_classes.label_de: Anderes nichtalkoholisches Getränk mit hohem Milchfettgehalt
new_classes.definition_en: A non-alcoholic beverage (other than those specifically enumerated in subheadings 2202 10, 2202 91, 2202 99 11–91) containing dairy-derived fat from products of headings 0401 to 0404 at a higher threshold level, including ready-to-drink 'filled milk' products (liquid products based on skimmed milk or skimmed milk powder to which refined vegetable fats or oils have been added), classified under CN subheading 2202 99 99.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the principal distinguishing criteria for CN 22029999: (1) the product is a non-alcoholic beverage; (2) it contains dairy-derived fat originating from headings 0401–0404; (3) it must be ready-to-drink (direct consumption); and (4) 'filled milk' as a sub-type is identified by its skimmed-milk base and the replacement of milk fat with refined vegetable fats/oils. Coverage is incomplete (score 0.72) because: (a) the specific fat-content threshold range that separates 22029999 from sibling subheadings 22029911–22029991 is not precisely encoded (the legal text is truncated and the exact percentage thresholds are not fully provided); (b) the requirement that the vegetable fats/oils be 'refined' is captured only implicitly via the DairyDerivedFatAddition class rather than as an explicit quality restriction; (c) the mutual disjointness from sibling subheadings (22029911, 22029919, 22029991) within 22029999 is not formally stated as complement restrictions due to the absence of those sibling class IRIs in the current TBox.
